framework.name: Agentic JWT (A-JWT) Dual-Faceted Token
framework.description: A token design that binds agent actions to cryptographic user intent + workflow step, using agent identity as a one-way checksum hash of prompt/tools/config, chained delegation assertions, and per-agent proof-of-possession keys. Introduces 'agent_checksum' authorization grant.
framework.raw_quote: A-JWT carries an agent's identity as a one-way checksum hash derived from its prompt, tools and configuration and a chained delegation assertion to prove which downstream agent may execute a given task.

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
